# openapi-spec Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [DistributionRegistry Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-distributionregistry.html): Handles how the specification is packaged and consumed across the Node.js ecosystem. Architectural overview of the DistributionRegistry domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [OpenApiSpec Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-openapispec.html): The primary domain responsible for defining the RESTful interface and data models for code analysis services. Architectural overview of the OpenApiSpec domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [package.json — openapi-spec Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/file-package-json.html): Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
